---
title: "Exercise 5A: Build a RAG Chatbot"
subtitle: "MGMT 675: Generative AI for Finance"
format:
  pdf:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{xcolor}
        \PassOptionsToPackage{colorlinks=true,urlcolor=blue,linkcolor=blue}{hyperref}
---

Build a RAG chatbot that answers questions about a corporate annual report.

\bigskip
\noindent\textbf{Background.}
Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) grounds an LLM's answers in actual documents. The pipeline has three stages: (1) chunk and embed a document into a vector database, (2) embed the user's query and retrieve the most relevant chunks, and (3) pass the retrieved chunks plus the query to an LLM for a grounded answer.

\bigskip
\noindent\textbf{What the finished app should do.}

\begin{enumerate}
  \item Load a corporate 10-K or annual report PDF (e.g., download one from the SEC's EDGAR system).
  \item Let the user type a question about the document.
  \item Return an answer that is grounded in the actual text of the document, with a citation showing which part(s) of the document the answer came from.
\end{enumerate}

Under the hood, the app will use \texttt{sentence-transformers} to embed the document and the query, a vector database to find the most relevant passages, and the OpenRouter API to generate answers. You do not need to know how to build any of this yourself --- ask Claude to build it for you.

\bigskip
\noindent\textbf{Setup.}

\begin{enumerate}
  \item Sign up at \href{https://openrouter.ai}{openrouter.ai} and copy your API key. Free models include\\
\texttt{nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b:free}\\
and others listed at \href{https://openrouter.ai/models}{openrouter.ai/models}.
  \item Give Claude a prompt like: \emph{``Build me a RAG chatbot in Python. It should load a PDF, chunk and embed it using sentence-transformers, store the embeddings in a vector database, and let me ask questions that are answered via API calls to a free model on OpenRouter. Each answer should cite which chunks were used. Here is my OpenRouter API key: ...''}
  \item Claude will generate the code, install dependencies, and walk you through running it.
\end{enumerate}

\bigskip
\noindent\textbf{Suggested questions to test.}

\begin{itemize}
  \item What was total revenue in the most recent fiscal year?
  \item What are the main risk factors related to competition?
  \item Summarize management's outlook for the coming year.
  \item How much did the company spend on research and development?
\end{itemize}

\bigskip
\noindent\textbf{Deliverables.}

\begin{itemize}
  \item Code (\texttt{5A-Code.zip}) --- your complete RAG app
  \item A document (\texttt{5A-QA.pdf}) containing at least 5 question-answer pairs from your chatbot, with your assessment of each answer: was it grounded in the document? Accurate? Any hallucinations?
\end{itemize}
